description:
In Redmine (already open in Firefox), log in as admin (Username: admin, Password: Admin1234!) and add a comment to the issue titled 'Migrate CI/CD from Jenkins to GitHub Actions' in the 'Infrastructure & DevOps' project. 

Add exactly the following comment text:

Phase 2 migration complete: build and packaging jobs now running on GitHub Actions. Average build time improved from 18 minutes to 9 minutes. All artifact uploads verified. Proceeding to Phase 3 (deployment jobs) next sprint.

Do not change the issue status or any other fields.

metadata.issue_subject_fragment: Migrate CI/CD from Jenkins to GitHub Actions
metadata.expected_comment: Phase 2 migration complete: build and packaging jobs now running on GitHub Actions. Average build time improved from 18 minutes to 9 minutes. All artifact uploads verified. Proceeding to Phase 3 (deployment jobs) next sprint.
